ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player position */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player height (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player weight (in pounds) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player status (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular season or playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player the stats belong to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the stats relate to */,
  "poss" INTEGER /* Number of possessions */,
  "mp" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "raptor_offense" REAL /* RAPTOR offensive rating */,
  "raptor_defense" REAL /* RAPTOR defensive rating */,
  "raptor_total" REAL /* Total RAPTOR rating */,
  "war_total" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement (WAR) total */,
  "war_reg_season" REAL /* WAR for regular season */,
  "war_playoffs" REAL /* WAR for playoffs */,
  "predator_offense" REAL /* Predator offensive rating */,
  "predator_defense" REAL /* Predator defensive rating */,
  "predator_total" REAL /* Total predator rating */,
  "pace_impact" REAL /* Impact on pace of play */,
  "ts_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "efg_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored at home */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Points scored away */,
  "playoff_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Team location */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Team conference */,
  "division" TEXT /* Team division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game is part of */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the away team */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season or playoffs) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Game attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Coach specialty (e.g., offense or defense) */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Coach win-loss record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player associated with the injury */,
  "date_incurred" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Injury severity (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Recovery time in days */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season when the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "coach_id" TEXT /* ID of the coach who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season when the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_awards_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "playoff_appearance" TEXT /* Whether the team made a playoff appearance (yes/no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_bracket" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the team in the playoffs */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_bracket_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_bracket_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_bracket_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
